meaning: n.方栓,齿条,止转楔,花键vt.用花键联接,开键槽
examples: I made a simple blueprint setup from these images and started to build a spline cage.
The computer calculates the inbetweens values based on a spline curve connecting the keyframe values.
Now I can just apply the spline method I described for the facade, drawing a spline with face snapping active.
